languages.text: "Следующий ход врага — бомбардировка штаба или оборонительного контура".
languages.translation_comment: фаза Затишья, играют DL_ToldLariaAboutLoop, DL_KnowAboutBombing и DL_BombsOnHQ ИЛИ DL_BombsOnMerovians

traits.locale_text: "Следующий ход врага — бомбардировка штаба или оборонительного контура".

languages.translation_comment: фаза Затишья, играют DL_ToldLariaAboutLoop, DL_KnowAboutBombing и DL_BombsOnHQ ИЛИ DL_BombsOnMerovians

languages.text: "The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."
languages.original_text: "Следующий ход врага — бомбардировка штаба или оборонительного контура".

traits.locale_text: "The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."
"The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."
"The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."

languages.text: “敌人下一步会炮击指挥部，或是我方防线。”
languages.original_text: "The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."

traits.locale_text: “敌人下一步会炮击指挥部，或是我方防线。”

languages.text: « L'ennemi s'apprête à bombarder le quartier général de nos lignes défensives. »
languages.original_text: "The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."

traits.locale_text: « L'ennemi s'apprête à bombarder le quartier général de nos lignes défensives. »

languages.text: "Bir sonraki hamlesinde düşman, karargâhı ya da savunma hattımızı bombalayacak."
languages.original_text: "The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."

traits.locale_text: "Bir sonraki hamlesinde düşman, karargâhı ya da savunma hattımızı bombalayacak."

languages.text: «El próximo movimiento del enemigo es bombardear nuestra base o nuestra línea defensiva».
languages.original_text: "The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."

traits.locale_text: «El próximo movimiento del enemigo es bombardear nuestra base o nuestra línea defensiva».

languages.text: "Der nächste Schritt des Feindes ist das Bombardement des Hauptquartiers oder unserer Verteidigungslinie."
languages.original_text: "The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."

traits.locale_text: "Der nächste Schritt des Feindes ist das Bombardement des Hauptquartiers oder unserer Verteidigungslinie."

languages.text: 「敵の次の行動は、本陣や我々の防衛線を爆撃することだ」
languages.original_text: "The enemy's next move is to bombard the headquarters or our defensive line."

traits.locale_text: 「敵の次の行動は、本陣や我々の防衛線を爆撃することだ」
